50: Ever since then, try as I might, I just can't shake the image of his face from my mind. What's worse─and I still don't know what drove me to it─I <Emphasis>stole</Emphasis>one of his keepsakes... This tiny metal trinket.

Ever since then, try as I might, I just can't shake the image of his face from my mind. What's worse─and I still don't know what drove me to it─I <Emphasis>stole</Emphasis> one of his keepsakes... This tiny metal trinket.
